Package org.mitre.synthea.world.concepts

Class TelemedicineConfig

java.lang.Object
org.mitre.synthea.world.concepts.TelemedicineConfig
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class TelemedicineConfig extends Object implements Serializable
Configuration that drives TypeOfCare transitions in Synthea. The concept is that an individual will seek a particular type of care (telemedicine vs. something in person) based on the time in the simulation and their insurance. Some insurance types, or lack thereof will have higher utilization of the emergency department.
See Also:

    Create an instance of TelemedicineConfig by reading it in from the JSON file in resources.
    List<String>
    getHighEmergencyUseInsuranceNames()
    Returns the list of insurance names with high emergency department utilization.
    org.apache.commons.math3.distribution.EnumeratedDistribution<String>
    getPreTelemedHighEmergency()
    Returns the distribution of emergency care types before telemedicine for high emergency use insurance.
    org.apache.commons.math3.distribution.EnumeratedDistribution<String>
    getPreTelemedTypicalEmergency()
    Returns the distribution of emergency care types before telemedicine for typical emergency use insurance.
    org.apache.commons.math3.distribution.EnumeratedDistribution<String>
    getTelemedHighEmergency()
    Returns the distribution of emergency care types during telemedicine for high emergency use insurance.
    long
    getTelemedicineStartTime()
    Returns the time in the simulation that transitions to telemedicine should start.

    getTelemedTypicalEmergency()
    Returns the distribution of emergency care types during telemedicine for typical emergency use insurance.
